company_summary: Motorola Solutions is a global leader in public safety technology — building mission-critical communications infrastructure, software, and services for police, fire, EMS, and government agencies. Their product portfolio spans land mobile radio (LMR), video security, and command center software including CAD (computer-aided dispatch), records management, and dispatch console systems. They are actively investing in AI-driven public safety workflows and cloud migration of legacy dispatch and operations platforms.
fit_indicators: Dispatch and command center products are deeply enterprise-grade, high-reliability systems — Sudheer's 4 years building enterprise Java systems at RNTBCI for Nissan/Renault/Mitsubishi operational infrastructure maps directly to this complexity and stakeholder scale

Motorola Solutions is migrating legacy dispatch platforms to modern architectures — Sudheer's explicit RNTBCI experience in legacy modernisation and microservices is a direct match for this transition challenge

PM role requires internal tooling and workflow automation for dispatch operations — Sudheer built billing, attendance, and design approval systems used daily across a multi-brand automotive org, demonstrating operational tooling ownership

Role requires managing cross-functional delivery across engineering, ops, and customers — Sudheer's Carlson STEM MBA combined with 4 years of technical delivery positions him as a bridge between product and engineering teams

Motorola Solutions is integrating AI into public safety workflows — Sudheer is actively building multi-agent AI systems with Claude API, directly relevant to AI product integration initiatives in dispatch and operations

contact_targets.title: Senior Product Manager or Group PM, Command Center Software
contact_targets.reason: Directly manages or peers with the Dispatch Products PM role — best person to understand team needs, validate fit, and provide a referral or warm introduction

contact_targets.title: Director of Product Management, Public Safety Software
contact_targets.reason: Likely the hiring manager or skip-level for this role — reaching out with a point of view on AI in dispatch or legacy modernisation would be a high-signal approach

contact_targets.title: Engineering Manager or Principal Engineer, Dispatch/CAD Platform
contact_targets.reason: Senior IC closest to the technical product work — can speak to what the PM role actually owns day-to-day and may influence hiring decisions
